_metadata.note: Read-only view. Edit loose files, re-compile.

index/derivation_index.json._note: Derivation functions are in data6/derivations/*.py modules. This index maps derivation IDs to module.function paths. Populated when derivation modules are written.

Gravitational_dominance_scale.json.name: Gravitational dominance scale
Gravitational_dominance_scale.json.what_changes: Gravity becomes the dominant long-range force for neutral massive objects. EM dominates for charged objects. No sharp boundary — crossover depends on charge/mass ratio.
open_questions: Does G vary with scale? (PHYS-3: untested across boundaries)
Is there a precise crossover scale?

Atomic_scale_Bohr_radius.json.name: Atomic scale (Bohr radius)
Atomic_scale_Bohr_radius.json.what_changes: Electromagnetic binding dominates. Atoms form. Quantum mechanics governs structure.

Electroweak_scale_M_Z.json.name: Electroweak scale (M_Z)
Electroweak_scale_M_Z.json.what_changes: Reference scale for all coupling measurements. Electroweak symmetry is broken below this scale. W and Z acquire mass.

Electron_threshold.json.name: Electron threshold
Electron_threshold.json.what_changes: Electron-positron pairs can no longer be created. Below this, only photons propagate freely.

Molecular_scale.json.name: Molecular scale
Molecular_scale.json.what_changes: Electromagnetic interactions between atoms form molecules. Chemistry. Biology begins at larger scales.

Cabibbo_Doublet_threshold.json.name: Cabibbo Doublet threshold
Cabibbo_Doublet_threshold.json.what_changes: Cabibbo Doublet (3,2,1/6) VL pair becomes active. Beta coefficients change: b_i -> b_i + Db_i. Gap ratio changes from 218/115 to 38/27.
open_questions: Is there a sharp threshold or smooth transition?

Planck_scale.json.name: Planck scale
Planck_scale.json.what_changes: Quantum gravity effects become order 1. Spacetime geometry itself may be quantized.
open_questions: What is the quantum theory of gravity?
Is there a desert between M_GUT and M_Planck?

Confinement_wall_lower_face.json.name: Confinement wall (lower face)
Confinement_wall_lower_face.json.what_changes: Hadronic resonances resolve into individual hadrons. Below this scale, quarks are confined inside hadrons. This is the INSIDE face of the confinement wall.
open_questions: What is the non-perturbative structure of the confinement transition?
Is there a soliton interpretation of confinement?

Top_quark_threshold.json.name: Top quark threshold
Top_quark_threshold.json.what_changes: Top quark becomes active. Last SM fermion threshold. Full SM particle content above this scale.

Tau_lepton_threshold.json.name: Tau lepton threshold
Tau_lepton_threshold.json.what_changes: Tau lepton decouples. Koide prediction: m_tau = 1776.97 MeV (0.006%% miss).
open_questions: Is m_tau derivable from Koide? (conditional, a^2=2 unresolved)

Strange_quark_threshold.json.name: Strange quark threshold
Strange_quark_threshold.json.what_changes: Strange quark decouples. 3-flavor to 2-flavor. Note: this is INSIDE the confinement wall — the threshold is real but perturbative beta running does not apply here.
open_questions: What is the correct treatment of flavor thresholds inside confinement?

Higgs_boson_threshold.json.name: Higgs boson threshold
Higgs_boson_threshold.json.what_changes: Higgs field excitation becomes resolvable. Higgs contribution to beta functions active.
open_questions: Is lambda (Higgs self-coupling) derivable? (parked, PHYS-24 Appendix J)

Nuclear_binding_scale.json.name: Nuclear binding scale
Nuclear_binding_scale.json.what_changes: Nuclear force (residual strong) binds nucleons. Deuteron binding energy E_D = 2.225 MeV.

Bottom_quark_threshold.json.name: Bottom quark threshold
Bottom_quark_threshold.json.what_changes: Bottom quark decouples below this scale. Effective theory changes from 5-flavor to 4-flavor.

Confinement_wall_upper_face.json.name: Confinement wall (upper face)
Confinement_wall_upper_face.json.what_changes: Perturbative QCD breaks down. alpha_s approaches O(1). Integer beta function rules cease to apply. This is the OUTSIDE face of the confinement wall.
open_questions: Is there a precise definition of the confinement boundary?
What is alpha_s at the transition?

GUT_unification_scale.json.name: GUT unification scale
GUT_unification_scale.json.what_changes: Three gauge couplings merge into one. SU(3)xSU(2)xU(1) -> SU(5) or larger. X, Y gauge bosons become active. Proton can decay.
open_questions: What is the GUT group? SU(5)? SO(10)?
What is the proton lifetime precisely?

a_0_x_alpha.json.name: a_0 * alpha
a_0_x_alpha.json.formula: hbar/(m_e*c) -- R2 cancels in the ratio

H0_DES_BAO_BBN.json.name: DES + BAO + BBN (combined cosmological)
H0_DES_BAO_BBN.json.method: baryon acoustic oscillations + big bang nucleosynthesis

H0_Planck.json.name: Planck CMB (cosmic microwave background)
H0_Planck.json.method: CMB power spectrum fit assuming Lambda-CDM

H0_H0LiCOW.json.name: H0LiCOW (gravitational lensing time delays)
H0_H0LiCOW.json.method: strong lensing time delays through lens galaxy

beta_unification/beta_unification.json.name: Beta Unification
beta_unification/beta_unification.json.thesis: CD modifies SM betas to produce unification with measured couplings
kill_switches: DM particles detected inconsistent with soliton model
alpha_s prediction fails at higher loop order

cosmological_parameters/cosmological_par.name: Cosmological Parameters
cosmological_parameters/cosmological_par.thesis: DM/baryon = (22/13)*pi and Omega_DM = (44/169)*R2 from gauge integers
kill_switches: Better rational fit found with different integers

soliton_gravity/soliton_gravity.json.name: Soliton Gravity
soliton_gravity/soliton_gravity.json.thesis: Gravity is ground state in soliton hierarchy
kill_switches: Dwarf dynamics incompatible with soliton model
